title: Junior Investment Banker at Niva Bupa South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at Niva Bupa South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Niva Bupa South Asia Partners! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Nagpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Niva Bupa South Asia Partners:
Niva Bupa South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Niva Bupa South Asia Partners!
